info.name: PDF Parser Backend
info.description:
Test the PDF Parser Backend locally and on Render.

**Local:** `http://localhost:4000`
**Deployed:** `https://pdf-parser-backend-ucsr.onrender.com`

For **Parse and Report**, use form-data key `pdf` and attach a PDF file.

item.name: Local (localhost:4000)

request.description: Liveness check. Returns 200 if the service is running.
Verifies Google/Vertex credentials are loaded. 200 = credentials OK; 503 = missing or invalid.
Upload a PDF lab report. Returns extracted patient info, test results with HIGH/LOW/NORMAL, and recommendations. Form field must be named `pdf`.

item.description: Requests against the backend running locally (default port 4000).

request.description: Liveness check for the deployed service on Render.
Verifies Vertex AI credentials on the deployed instance.
Upload a PDF to the deployed backend. Form field must be named `pdf`.
